title: Fix ordering bug: mode(:shared) called before checkout
prompt: The fixture at `test_fixtures/buggy_data_case.ex` calls `mode(MyApp.Repo, {:shared, self()})` BEFORE `checkout(MyApp.Repo)`. That's wrong — the shared-mode GenServer has no owner to share because checkout hasn't established one. Rewrite the file to `test/support/data_case.ex` with the correct order: checkout FIRST, then conditionally mode based on `unless tags[:async]`.
tier_rationale: Ordering bug — requires understanding of the state machine to fix correctly.
research_citation: "changing the sandbox mode affects what happens when you call `checkout`, so these should likely be in the opposite order" — Elixir Forum, al2o3cr
